title: An Act to Require Municipal Clerks to Issue Absentee Ballots Only to Residents of That Municipality and to Eliminate Ongoing Absentee Voter Status
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 18, 2025
last_house_action: 2/20/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on February 20, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 3/18/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
